skill: Search Web and Open Target Result

targets.name: Google search box
targets.annotation_query: Google search box below the Google logo on the homepage
targets.grounding_query: Where is Google search box below the Google logo on the homepage? Return its bounding box as {"bbox_2d": [x1, y1, x2, y2]} in 0-1000 relative coordinates.

targets.name: Target search result
targets.annotation_query: search result title "Prince - Purple Rain (Official Video)" on the Google results page
targets.grounding_query: Where is search result title "Prince - Purple Rain (Official Video)" on the Google results page? Return its bounding box as {"bbox_2d": [x1, y1, x2, y2]} in 0-1000 relative coordinates.

targets.name: Destination page heading
targets.annotation_query: NVIDIA Corp heading on the Google Finance stock page
targets.grounding_query: Where is NVIDIA Corp heading on the Google Finance stock page? Return its bounding box as {"bbox_2d": [x1, y1, x2, y2]} in 0-1000 relative coordinates.
